semantic_description: The target function count_multiples is a scalar-only counting loop. Under preconditions 1 <= n < INT_MAX and 1 <= k, it initializes cnt to 0, iterates i from 1 through n inclusive, increments cnt exactly when i % k == 0, and returns the Coq specification count_multiples_spec n k. The loop may execute at least once because n is positive; it does not read or modify heap memory.
